title: Questions you want answers to
wikitext:
[]: Questions you want answers to             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Jan 30, 2015 10:38 am Any burning unanswered questions that you want answers to by movies end?

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Fri Jan 30, 2015 10:44 am if the ending is amazing will people stop treating rebuild like its irrelevant ? in-universe can the series end with Shinji slightly more happy please?

[]:             Quote Post by Glor » Fri Jan 30, 2015 10:49 am MARI - WHAT IS THINE TRUE PURPOSE?! Is it more than shameless T&A? I have a feeling I'll be disappointed either way.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Jan 30, 2015 10:51 am Glor wrote: MARI - WHAT IS THINE TRUE PURPOSE?! Is it more than shameless T&A?

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Jan 30, 2015 10:56 am Yup I want to know about Mari; would be cool if anything straightforward regarding her existence would be dropped. One may dream. Other than that, I don't need straight answers, it could even be on Ikuhara-levels of wackiness. Yeah, it would be cool, if Anno could bring Ikuhara onboard... After Yuri Kuma Arashi he might be looking for another job.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jan 30, 2015 11:01 am What was the deal with Kaworu? Why was he immediately and so completely obsessed by making him happy since day one? How did he even know him before meeting him in Q? What's with this "meet you again" and "this time I'll make you happy"?

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Jan 30, 2015 11:02 am ^ Well, he's an Angel and is thus living outside the human perception of time and space.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Jan 30, 2015 11:03 am Dear Anno, stop trawling the internet for ideas and write your own movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Fri Jan 30, 2015 11:23 am ^What do you mean? I'd like the Final to maybe go into the events after N3I, because what we know I believe isn't all that happened. And if it is... well fuck. Also knowing about Mari would be nice. There are a long list of questions many have and I can't think of them .

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Jan 30, 2015 11:39 am Is The Sequel Theory true? I have to know!!

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Jan 30, 2015 11:49 am robersora wrote: Well, he's an Angel and is thus living outside the human perception of time and space.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jan 30, 2015 11:51 am Glor wrote: MARI - WHAT IS THINE TRUE PURPOSE?! Is it more than shameless T&A?

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Jan 30, 2015 12:26 pm pwhodges wrote: We say this a lot, glibly; but actually, the other angels, while powerful, don't show any such extreme mysterious powers. As it's only Kaworu and Rei that seem to have the power to transcend time in some way, perhaps we should ascribe that ability to their being seeds (in part) rather than angels.

[]:             Quote Post by Glor » Fri Jan 30, 2015 12:45 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Strangely enough, we’ve yet to see either Mari’s tits or ass in the nude. Now Rei, on the other hand, has hers displayed prominently in 1.11. In that context, I can’t even argue that Mari’s purpose was shameless T&A. I mean, if that was her purpose, you’d think that she’d actually display them shamelessly to the viewer (or to even any character in the film) at one point, right? To solidify my point, I’ll give $1,000 USD to anyone who can screen cap either Mari's nipples or her bare buns from 1.11, 2.22, or 3.33. And I’m not even joking. Dead serious. If someone can show me legit Mari naughty bits from the first three Anno-directed NTE film, that person gets money. Internet, GO! (The closest I’ve got was an unused up-skirt panty-shot meant for the preview at the end of 1.11. Despite anyone’s claims, Studio Khara actually seems very protective over Mari’s body. Fan art, on the other hand... not so much.) Unless, by “T&A” you meant “Thoughts and Assumptions.” If so, then yeah. You probably nailed it.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Jan 30, 2015 12:49 pm Glor wrote: But then Rebuild just strips down the other pilots whenever it sees the opportunity and I ask - why?

[]:             Quote Post by Gus Hanson » Fri Jan 30, 2015 1:07 pm Are the following characters still alive: Kaji, Toji, Kensuke, and Hikari?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jan 30, 2015 1:17 pm pwhodges wrote: We say this a lot, glibly; but actually, the other angels, while powerful, don't show any such extreme mysterious powers. As it's only Kaworu and Rei that seem to have the power to transcend time in some way, perhaps we should ascribe that ability to their being seeds (in part) rather than angels.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Fri Jan 30, 2015 2:44 pm I simply like to know what really went down between 2.22 and 3.33.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Jan 30, 2015 3:04 pm I wanna know why Bardiel may have only infected Asuka's eye! That doesn't make sense! Start with the brain dumbass!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 30, 2015 8:06 pm robersora wrote: One thing I'd really like to know is, if there is any reason besides an apocalyptic finale for each movie (a.k.a. and in-universe explanation) for the convoluted impact mechanics. And what the hell Gendo's ultra-nifty plan is.
summary:
[]: Questions you want answers to             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Jan 30, 2015 10:38 am Any burning unanswered questions that you want answers to by movies end?

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Fri Jan 30, 2015 10:44 am if the ending is amazing will people stop treating rebuild like its irrelevant ? in-universe can the series end with Shinji slightly more happy p
